summary: Phase 4 AI Mentor tested end-to-end. Backend pytest: 10/10 pass covering chat (real Gemini), follow-up memory, KB-injection for Kadane, history, conversation detail (ASC order), new-chat, delete cascade, missing_key 400, context/preview. Frontend: /app/ai-mentor loads with 4 starter prompt cards, sidebar w/ New chat, Mentor Context panel (Learner=PrepOS Admin, target=google, strong=Kadane's Algorithm, mission ld 0/2). Starter click sends → assistant reply renders in markdown → composer clears → sidebar refreshes. Shift+Enter inserts newline, Enter sends. New chat button clears active thread. Sidebar delete button with confirm dialog works (5 → 4 convos). Regression: settings + KB unaffected.
critical_code_review_comments: context_builder is well-factored (10 signals, graceful degradation, no side effects). No file >700 lines, all endpoints async, ObjectId excluded, env vars used correctly.
mentor_service reuses ai_service.complete_json — no duplication, aligns with 'reusable intelligence layer' goal.
Delete cascade in conversation_store.delete_conversation correctly removes messages — no orphan risk.
Cookie auth via get_current_user consistent with rest of app. AIProviderError → HTTPException mapping preserves 'missing_key' kind so UI can react.
Nit (non-blocking): auto-rename on first turn is fire-and-forget — good, but consider logging failures. Currently silent.
seed_data_creation: Test flow creates ~4 mentor_conversations + associated mentor_messages under admin user; deletes made via test remove them. Some conversations remain in admin's sidebar from combined manual+auto testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Mentor is a modular backend module (backend/ai_mentor/). Two Mongo collections: mentor_conversations, mentor_messages. Testids in frontend use suffix pattern e.g. mentor-conversation-item-{id} and mentor-delete-conversation-button-{id} — use starts-with selector [data-testid^='mentor-conversation-item-']. Confirm dialog on delete uses window.confirm — use page.once('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()).
